Class VerificationResponse

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.verify.paper.api.model.VerificationResponse
public class VerificationResponse extends Object
Represents the detailed verification data returned by the API for a specific player. Contains both the access status (allowed or not) and the associated forum identity details.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    VerificationResponse()
    Default constructor for Gson deserialization.
    VerificationResponse(boolean allowed, VerificationReason reason)
    Constructs a response with a status and reason.

    • VerificationResponse

      public VerificationResponse()
      Default constructor for Gson deserialization.

    • VerificationResponse

      public VerificationResponse(boolean allowed, VerificationReason reason)
      Constructs a response with a status and reason.
      Parameters:
      allowed - whether access is granted
      reason - the reason for the status

  • Method Details

    • isAllowed

      public boolean isAllowed()
      Checks if the player is allowed to join.
      Returns:
      true if allowed, false otherwise

    • getReason

      public VerificationReason getReason()
      Gets the reason for the verification outcome.
      Returns:
      the verification reason

    • getPasscode

      public String getPasscode()
      Gets the link passcode if provided by the API.
      Returns:
      the passcode string

    • getXfUserId

      public int getXfUserId()
      Gets the XenForo user ID.
      Returns:
      the forum user ID

      public String getForumUsername()
      Gets the forum username.
      Returns:
      the forum username

    • getMcUsername

      public String getMcUsername()
      Gets the Minecraft username.
      Returns:
      the Minecraft username

    • isConfirmed

      public boolean isConfirmed()
      Checks if the account link is confirmed.
      Returns:
      true if confirmed date is not null
